title: Tug-of-War Net Force
body: In a tug-of-war, $$15$$ students pull on a rope. Two students pull with $$196$$ N each to the right, four students pull with $$98$$ N each to the left, five students pull with $$62$$ N each to the left, three students pull with $$150$$ N each to the right, and one student pulls with $$250$$ N to the left. Assuming positive direction is to the right, express the net pull on the knot in terms of the unit vector i. How big is the net pull and in what direction?
